# SEO Content Architecture

## Purpose
Build organic acquisition surfaces that are useful to users, commercially valuable, and structurally coherent.

## Use this skill when
- The task is about categories, store pages, coupon pages, deal hubs, or organic growth.
- The user wants to structure the marketplace around search intent.
- A landing page needs better information architecture or content logic.

## Reference files
- Read [SEO Playbook](./references/SEO-PLAYBOOK.md) when deciding page types, search intent, content depth, or internal linking patterns.

## Procedure
1. Identify the intent class: discovery, comparison, merchant-specific, coupon-specific, or seasonal.
2. Choose the right page type instead of forcing every query into the same template.
3. Define what unique value the page provides beyond listing links.
4. Keep URL structure, headings, and internal linking aligned with the information architecture.
5. Avoid thin, repetitive, or near-duplicate pages with no clear user value.
6. If implementation is requested, keep SEO structure readable in code and consistent across routes.

## Guardrails
- Do not create pages just to target keywords without a useful shopping outcome.
- Avoid taxonomy explosion with weak or overlapping pages.
- Keep organic acquisition aligned with trust and editorial quality.
